name: edtech-partner-success
description: EdTech-flavored Partner Success Manager team — 6 specialist agents anchored on the PSM lane, with 14 skills, 16 templates, 1 advisory hook, and a 16-doc knowledge bank. Covers QBRs, success plans, health scores, a self-contained Power-BI-style partner-health report (demo data + generator), onboarding checklists, touchpoint logs, adoption sequencing, 90-day implementation arcs, train-the-trainer curricula, advocacy/reference pipelines, renewal decision memos, and (v0.5.0) the back-end integration contract for a centralized CS dashboard on a Planhat + Salesforce + Snowflake + Zapier + Granola stack (cs-platform-integration skill, cs-stack-integration knowledge file, partner-pickup-brief template). Team growth ships as skills + knowledge + templates rather than parallel agents (marketplace house rule). Compact inline priors on the 6 agents; primary-source citations with retrieval dates. Vertical-explicit but segment-agnostic — fits K-12, higher-ed, corporate L&D, or mixed EdTech books. Inherits ravenclaude-core protocols including the alternate-methods Capability Grounding Protocol.
